ABOUT.HERO_SUB: Connecting talented professionals with customers who need them
ABOUT.MISSION_P1: yProHub was built with a simple mission: make it easy for people to find trusted professionals for any service, and give skilled workers a platform to grow their business.
ABOUT.MISSION_P2: We believe in transparency, security, and community. Every professional on yProHub is verified, every customer is protected, and every transaction is secure.
ABOUT.VAL1_DESC: We believe in transparent dealings and building long-term trust with both professionals and customers. No hidden fees, no surprises.
ABOUT.VAL2_DESC: Your data and transactions are protected with industry-leading encryption and verification processes. We take security seriously.
ABOUT.VAL3_DESC: We maintain high standards for all professionals on our platform through verification, reviews, and community feedback.
ABOUT.VAL4_DESC: We're committed to helping professionals grow their businesses and customers find the right help for their needs.
ABOUT.DIFF1_DESC: Every professional completes identity verification, background checks, and skill validation. Customers hire with confidence.
ABOUT.DIFF2_DESC: Transparent pricing with no surprise fees. Professionals set their rates, and customers know exactly what they'll pay upfront.
ABOUT.DIFF3_DESC: Payment escrow ensures both sides are protected. Money is held until work is complete and approved.
ABOUT.DIFF4_DESC: Reviews, ratings, and feedback build our community. Professionals who deliver excellence rise to the top.
ABOUT.TEAM_INTRO: We're a passionate team of technologists, entrepreneurs, and service industry veterans dedicated to revolutionizing how people connect for services.
ABOUT.CTA_SUB: Join thousands of professionals and customers already using yProHub

HOME.HERO_SUB: yProHub makes it easy to find, hire, and manage verified professionals for any service. Post a job, compare bids, and get it done.
HOME.BENEFIT1_DESC: All professionals are identity verified with real customer reviews.
HOME.BENEFIT2_DESC: Post a job and get quotes from qualified pros in minutes.
HOME.BENEFIT3_DESC: Escrow-protected payments released only when work is complete.
HOME.BENEFIT4_DESC: Message pros in-app before, during, and after the job.
HOME.CTA_SUB: Join thousands of customers and pros using yProHub to connect and grow.

ADD_SERVICE.HERO_SUB: List your professional services and start receiving client inquiries
ADD_SERVICE.NAME_MIN: Service name must be at least 5 characters
ADD_SERVICE.NAME_MAX: Service name must not exceed 100 characters
ADD_SERVICE.DESC_PLACEHOLDER: Describe your service in detail. What services do you offer? What are your qualifications?
ADD_SERVICE.DESC_MIN: Description must be at least 20 characters
ADD_SERVICE.IMAGE_HINT: Paste a direct link to a photo that best represents your service
ADD_SERVICE.IMAGE_INVALID: URL must start with http:// or https://
ADD_SERVICE.TIPS_TITLE: Tips for a Great Service Listing
ADD_SERVICE.TIP1: Use a clear, descriptive service name that clients will easily understand
ADD_SERVICE.TIP2: Provide detailed information about what's included in your service
ADD_SERVICE.TIP3: Be specific about your experience and qualifications
ADD_SERVICE.TIP4: Update your service regularly with new information or changes

EDIT_SERVICE.TIP1: Keep your service name clear and descriptive
EDIT_SERVICE.TIP2: Update your description if you've expanded your services
EDIT_SERVICE.TIP3: Adjust pricing based on market changes and your experience
EDIT_SERVICE.TIP4: Review and update regularly to maintain visibility

CONTACT.HERO_SUB: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
CONTACT.NAME: Full Name
CONTACT.SUBJECT: Subject
CONTACT.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Tell us more about your inquiry... (at least 20 characters)
CONTACT.MESSAGE_MIN: Message must be at least 20 characters
CONTACT.AGREE: I agree to be contacted about my inquiry
CONTACT.AGREE_REQUIRED: You must agree to be contacted
CONTACT.SUCCESS: ✓ Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.
CONTACT.ERROR: ✗ There was an error sending your message. Please try again.
CONTACT.OFFICE_TEXT: yProHub Headquarters, San Francisco, CA 94102, United States
CONTACT.CHAT_DESC: Available on our website during business hours
CONTACT.FAQ1_Q: How quickly will I hear back?
CONTACT.FAQ1_A: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 business hours. Urgent support requests may be prioritized.
CONTACT.FAQ2_Q: What's the best way to report an issue?
CONTACT.FAQ2_A: Use our contact form above and select "Technical Support" as the subject. Include as much detail as possible about the issue you're experiencing.
CONTACT.FAQ3_Q: How can I become a partner?
CONTACT.FAQ3_A: We're always interested in partnerships! Select "Partnership Opportunity" when contacting us, and let us know how you'd like to collaborate.
CONTACT.FAQ4_Q: Do you have a physical office I can visit?
CONTACT.FAQ4_A: Yes! Our headquarters is in San Francisco. Contact us to schedule a visit or learn about our other office locations.
